# komodo_deployments (Data Source)

Lists all Komodo deployments visible to the authenticated user.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# List all deployments
data "komodo_deployments" "all" {}

# List deployments running on a specific server
data "komodo_deployments" "on_server" {
  server_id = "6627c3e4f1a2b3c4d5e6f7a8"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `server_id` (String) Filter deployments by server ID. When set, only deployments running on this server are returned.

### Read-Only

- `deployments` (Attributes List) The list of deployments. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--deployments))

<a id="nestedatt--deployments"></a>
### Nested Schema for `deployments`

Read-Only:

- `id` (String) The deployment identifier (ObjectId).
- `image` (String) The container image.
- `name` (String) The name of the deployment.
- `send_alerts` (Boolean) Whether alerts are enabled for this deployment.
- `server_id` (String) The ID of the server the deployment runs on.
